definition: The branch is gated by a structural, derived, or state-dependent condition with no exploitable scalar CMP literal (table-derived glyph categories, Ragel state-machine range transitions, pointer/list-state predicates, syllable-length counts, USE/Indic/Thai/Myanmar category assignments from font tables). I2S has no input-byte pre-image to substitute, burns per-execution CmpLog overhead, and in many cases actively displaces or disrupts the structural byte patterns that undirected havoc mutation assembles to satisfy the gate.

authoring_contract.goal: ONE parameterized template.c isolating this cluster's shared mechanism, with exactly ONE compile-time -D knob = the program-feature axis. params.json:parameter MUST name that macro; scan_values sweep it; fuzzers = involved_fuzzers; expected_direction = '<winner> > <loser>'.
authoring_contract.isolate: No partial-match coverage edges unless the mechanism IS a gradient (VP families). Keep the gate the only objective.

signature.mechanism_summary: I2S adds per-exec CMP-buffer cost with no substitution benefit: the gate is a pointer-arithmetic relation (start>=end), not an input-byte literal, so vpc's extra I2S stage yields no traction while lowering throughput relative to plain value_profile.
signature.one_line: Pointer-arithmetic emptiness check; I2S has no literal to substitute

analysis.summary_one_line: After whitespace trim, the token must be a lone sign character (+ or -) with no digits following, so start reaches end.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: A byte region parsed as a number where, after leading/trailing whitespace is consumed and exactly one sign char (0x2b '+' or 0x2d '-') is consumed at start[0], start advances to meet end — i.e. a sign-only token with nothing after the sign.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: The winning value_profile seed contains a long contiguous run of 0x2b ('+') bytes (offsets 0x1d-0x2b) feeding the parser; once the sign is consumed start immediately equals end, so line 659 takes the true branch (W shows T=6 F=0 at 659 vs L T=0 F=12). value_profile reaches it via CMP_MAP gradient feedback on the start>=end / isspace comparisons plus havoc, with no I2S stage.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: The value_profile_cmplog loser seeds embed a sign (0x2d '-') but surrounded by digits and other content (e.g. 'elf -444444440'), so after consuming the sign there are still bytes before end; line 659 always falls through (L T=0 F=12) and the downstream base-parsing/safe_parse_positive_int path executes 24x while it never runs in W (0 hits).
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: value_profile's CMP_MAP gradient feedback rewards inputs that bring the start>=end and whitespace/sign comparisons closer to matching, preserving the sign-only-token corpus member; the input-to-state delta added in vpc does not help here because the gate is a pointer-arithmetic relation (start>=end) with no input-byte literal to substitute, so vpc's extra per-exec CMP-buffer cost yields no benefit and it loses, leaving CMP_MAP gradient as the technique that distinguishes the winner.

analysis.summary_one_line: Reaching the non-matching false side needs diverse multi-entry list content, which I2S substitution destroys by collapsing inputs onto repetitive escape-literal text.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: A SRP/DNS-update payload diverse enough to build a multi-entry router/cache linked list whose first scanned entry does NOT match the Ip6::Address indicator, so the FindMatching loop iterates and the entry->Matches() comparison takes its false side instead of matching/terminating immediately.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: Winner seeds (naive, value_profile) carry heterogeneous, structured byte content (e.g. naive seed 1 begins dc 62 5c 00 00 00 ff fe ff 78 30 30 ... with varied fields) and the winner hit the false branch 1140 times (naive), evidence the loop iterated over non-matching entries.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: Loser seeds (cmplog, value_profile_cmplog) are dominated by repetitive `5c 78 30 30` ("\x00") escape runs; the loser's comparison-substitution mutator overwrites byte spans with logged CMP operands, collapsing inputs toward a single homogeneous pattern that never builds the diverse list needed to drive the loop's false side (loser hitcount on branch = 0).
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: The winner wins by LACKING the comparison-substitution stage: plain havoc/token mutation (BytesSetMutator, TokenReplace, ByteDecMutator, WordInterestingMutator) preserves input diversity, so the corpus retains varied list-building payloads. The loser's operand-substitution mutator repeatedly rewrites byte spans to matching CMP operands, homogenizing the input and starving the false-branch path — an anti-comparison-solving divergence won by pure havoc exploration.
